fixes_applied: Hoisted 4 plan-named tests into FAIL_TO_PASS (prior batch)
Stripped 2 noise files from patch (prior batch): crates/cli/src/node_commands.rs (whitespace-only) and crates/node-host/src/service.rs (unrelated plist/systemd refactor)

f2p_behavioral_check.rationale: All 4 F2P names are tokio integration tests in crates/gateway/tests/auth_middleware.rs that assert HTTP status codes against a live axum server with a MockOnboardingService. They cover the four canonical behavior cells of the bypass — (local|remote) x (onboarding|onboarded) x (allowlisted|privileged) path — exactly mirroring the truth table from the issue (#378/#386). No assertions on internal struct/function names, no implementation-coupled state, no log-string scraping. Multiple valid framings of the fix (helper fn vs inline path-check, different debug-import shape) all pass the behavior.

patch_clean_check.rationale: Patch touches exactly the 2 files declared in install_config.json source_files/test_files. The two stripped files (node_commands.rs whitespace, service.rs plist refactor) are documented in _reconstruction_warnings and are not present in the current patch body. Confirmed via regex scan: only `+async fn` definitions added are start_server_with_onboarding (helper) and the 4 F2P test fns — no extra unrelated functions slipped in.

curator_log.notes: Prior batch's hoist + strip is sound. (1) F2P names map 1:1 to real `async fn` declarations in the patched tests file; each asserts response.status against a real server, not source-grep behaviour. (2) Patch body is the minimal 2-file change; the manifest/source_files/test_files all agree (auth_middleware.rs + its integration tests). (3) Note that test.sh actually uses structural source-grep gates (cargo intractable in E2B per verifier_note) and its emitted gate IDs differ slightly from test_manifest.yaml IDs (e.g. g1_bypass_helper_present vs g1_bypass_logic_present), but this is a pre-existing manifest cosmetics issue, orthogonal to the F2P/patch curation under review and does not affect scoring (test.sh is the source of truth for reward.txt). Σ(weights)=1.00 across the 6 grep gates with no P2P_REGRESSION zero-trap. anti-over-fit posture preserved: tracing::debug accepts both `use tracing::{debug,...}` and `use tracing::debug`; narrow path gate accepts any 2 of 3 new paths.
